Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH'S Motion For Court Approval and Entry Of Consent Judgment. Appearances: Howard Hirsch, Esq. Lexington Law Group, LLP, (415) 759-4111. There are no other appearances. Hearing held and argued. Ruling: Plaintiff Center for Environmental Health's Motion for Court approval and entry of consent judgment is Granted. Order Granting Plaintiff's Motion for Court approval and entry of Consent Judgment, and Consent Judgment, are both signed in Open Court. (302/CWW/PB) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
